task_completion.description: Agent executes the deployment command in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows a command like 'docker compose up' or 'docker-compose up' being executed within the '/home/ga/voting-app/' directory.

task_completion.description: All five required Docker services are running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (e.g., 'Started' logs for vote, result, worker, redis, db) or Docker Desktop UI showing 5 containers/services actively running.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the vote app URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar showing 'http://localhost:5001' or '127.0.0.1:5001'.

task_completion.description: The vote app UI is successfully rendered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser viewport displays the Example Voting App frontend (typically a prompt to vote between two options like Cats vs Dogs).

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the result app URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar showing 'http://localhost:5002' or '127.0.0.1:5002'.

task_completion.description: The result app UI is successfully rendered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser viewport displays the Example Voting App results viewer (typically showing percentages or vote counts).

integrity.description: The agent uses a real web browser navigating to localhost, not opening local static files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar must show an HTTP connection to localhost/127.0.0.1, not a 'file://' URI or a text editor preview.

integrity.description: The agent actually deployed the application using Docker.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of Docker CLI commands or Docker Desktop usage, rather than manually running Python/Node scripts outside of containers.

integrity.description: The agent used the provided configuration directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal prompts or file explorer paths should indicate the agent is working inside '/home/ga/voting-app/' and did not clone a new repository from the internet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The deployment must result in exactly 5 expected services running: 'vote', 'result', 'worker', 'redis', and 'db'. The 'vote' service must be mapped to port 5001 (accessible at http://localhost:5001) and the 'result' service must be mapped to port 5002 (accessible at http://localhost:5002).
